citation: Soobitsky, R., 2023, Manual inventory of landslides in Rwanda, 2023-05-02. NASA GSFC. Juang CS, Stanley TA, and Kirschbaum DB. (2019). Using citizen science to expand the global map of landslides: Introducing the Cooperative Open Online Landslide Repository (COOLR). PLOS ONE. 14(7): e0218657. doi: 1371/journal.pone.0218657.
